participant.partner_comment: We developed little nicknames for the baskets as we got to know them. I thought they did really well and would love to work with them again. We got really good at it.
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: They didn't use the terms and punctuation that AI usually uses. I'm sure I can be fooled though.
